author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Sprint B.5.a — #862 DenseNet121 forward parity.

Approach:
- DenseNet121 already has output shape test in unit tests (test_densenet121_output_shape)
- Need conformance test in conformance_vision_models.rs that:
  1. Verifies param count against a new fixture (densenet121_num_classes_10_param_count)
  2. Verifies forward output shape [1,10] for 32x32 input (densenet121_output_shape_32x32)
  3. Verifies forward runs without error (structural parity)
- Per-layer intermediate activations via forward_features for localization on divergence
- Add fixtures to scripts/regenerate_vision_fixtures.py and fixtures.json
- Remove cascade_skip (currently no cascade_skip in conformance for densenet — test doesn't exist yet, add new tests)
- ferrotorch DenseNet omits BN (same as ResNet), so param count will differ from torchvision; we fixture our own count

DenseNet-121 param count (no BN, our own architecture):
- stem: 3*64*7*7 = 9408 (no bias)
- block1 (6 layers, growth=32, bn_size=4): layer_i has (in_ch=64+i*32), inter=128, then 128*32*3*3=36864 + in_ch_i*128*1*1
- trans1/2/3: 1x1 conv only
- classifier: in_ch*10 + 10
Will compute exact count in fixture.
